briefdescription.para: EDID block size in bytes (128 bytes)
Maximum number of EDID extension blocks (254)
Additional Timing Block Data (CEA EDID Timing Extension)
Field sequential stereo, right eye first.
Field sequential stereo, left eye first.
DisplayID 2.0 data block tag codes (VESA DisplayID 2.0 Standard).
DisplayID 1.x data block tag codes (legacy support for backward compatibility).
Monitor descriptor string type (14 characters including null terminator).
Horizontal sync pulse width low byte.
Vertical sync pulse width low nibble.
Vertical sync pulse width high bits.
Horizontal sync pulse width high bits.

detaileddescription.para: Extension tag identifying the extension type

briefdescription.para: Maximum pixel clock = (value * 10) MHz (round to 10 MHz)

detaileddescription.para: Header information EDID header (00 FF FF FF FF FF FF 00)
Manufacturer ID (compressed ASCII) Manufacturer ID (compressed ASCII)

briefdescription.para: Maximum horizontal image size in cm.
Maximum vertical image size in cm.
White point X coordinate high byte.
White point Y coordinate high byte.
Checksum (sum of all 128 bytes should equal 0)
Extract pixel clock from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract horizontal blanking from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract horizontal active pixels from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract vertical blanking from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract vertical active lines from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract vertical sync offset from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract vertical sync pulse width from EDID detailed timing descriptor.

simplesect.para: Vertical sync pulse width in lines.

briefdescription.para: Extract horizontal sync offset from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract horizontal sync pulse width from EDID detailed timing descriptor.

simplesect.para: Horizontal sync pulse width in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Extract horizontal image size from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract vertical image size from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Extract stereo mode from EDID detailed timing descriptor.
Calculate horizontal active pixels from EDID standard timing descriptor.
Calculate vertical active lines from EDID standard timing descriptor.
Extract refresh rate from EDID standard timing descriptor.
Extract manufacturer name from EDID structure.

parameterdescription.para: Output buffer for 4-character manufacturer name (3 chars + null terminator).

briefdescription.para: Extract gamma value from EDID structure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct edid *const edid, const u8 timing)
memberdef.name: xvidc_edid_detailed_timing_is_monitor_descriptor

briefdescription.para: Check if detailed timing descriptor is actually a monitor descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: Index of detailed timing descriptor to check.

simplesect.para: True if monitor descriptor, false otherwise.
True if checksum is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Decode EDID fixed-point value to floating point.
Convert EDID detailed timing descriptor to video timing parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to detailed timing descriptor structure.

briefdescription.para: Initialize EDID control parameter structure with default values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to EDID control parameter structure to initialize.

inbodydescription.para: < Maximum Fixed Rate Link line rate
< Total number of video timing modes
< Number of Type VI timing descriptors
< Number of Type VII timing descriptors
< Number of Type VIII timing descriptors
< Number of Type IX timing descriptors
< Number of Type X timing descriptors

briefdescription.para: Parse EDID data and populate control parameter structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to EDID control parameter structure to populate.
Verbosity enable flag for debug output.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *const data, XV_VidC_EdidCntrlParam *EdidCtrlParam, XV_VidC_Verbose VerboseEn, u8 SegmentNum)
memberdef.name: XV_VidC_parse_edid_extension

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to EDID extension block data.
Pointer to EDID control parameter structure to update.
Verbosity enable flag for debug output.
